headline: CrowdStrike’s Record ARR And AI Security Push Reshape Growth Story
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) reported record fiscal 2026 results, surpassing US$5b in annual recurring revenue. The company posted its first GAAP profit in Q4 alongside record net new ARR, reflecting operational execution at scale. CrowdStrike launched new products, including FalconID, aimed at zero friction, AI resistant authentication as AI driven attacks increase. Partnerships with VAST Data and NVIDIA, plus new integrations with Qualtrics, extend CrowdStrike's role in securing...
